headline: GTA Online Event Week: The Kortz Center Heist Update Released (14th-22nd)
quickTake: NEW DLC: The Kortz Center Heist is live — plan the art heist from a Mansion Art Studio
The GTA Online Weekly Challenge for this week is "Complete The Kortz Center Heist"
This week at the Casino in GTA Online, take your daily spin with the lucky wheel for your chance to win the Dinka Jester RR, which costs $1,970,000 from Legendary Motorsport
This week in GTA Online, place top 4in a LS Car Meet Race unlock the Obey Omnis e-GT as the Prize Ride vehicle
This week's GTA Online Premium Test Ride Vehicle is the Weeny Issi Rally for PS5, Xbox Series X/S and PC Enhanced players

sections.title: New DLC: The Kortz Center Heist

items.label: Check your deliveries: pre-launch rewards (GTA$500K + Turreted Limo for logging in, GTA$1M + NOOSE Outfit for any heist, extra gifts for mansion owners) arrive within 72 hours of July 13
GTA+ members: claim the free Grotti Veleno GT (GTA$3,000,000 value) at the Vinewood Car Club before July 21
Hosting the heist? Buy a Mansion via Dynasty 8 — Tongva Estate, Vinewood Residence or Richman Villa, from GTA$11.5M
Add the Art Studio expansion (GTA$4.7M — as low as GTA$2.7M with the Elitist and GTA+ discounts) to unlock the heist planning board
Run The Kortz Center Heist (solo or up to 4 players) — three new paintings rotate every week, so it repeats as a money-maker
No mansion? Join a friend's Kortz Center Heist crew — only the host needs the property
The GTA Online Weekly Challenge for this week is "Complete The Kortz Center Heist"
This week at the Casino in GTA Online, take your daily spin with the lucky wheel for your chance to win the Dinka Jester RR, which costs $1,970,000 from Legendary Motorsport
This week in GTA Online, place top 4in a LS Car Meet Race unlock the Obey Omnis e-GT as the Prize Ride vehicle
This week's GTA Online Premium Test Ride Vehicle is the Weeny Issi Rally for PS5, Xbox Series X/S and PC Enhanced players
This week's GTA Online Test Track Vehicles are the Karin Futo GTX, Bravado Greenwood & Vysser Neo

The McTony Robbery: Pfister Neon
The GTA Online Luxury Autos Car Dealership located in Rockford Hills has two cars on show for purchase

This week's Premium Race is Art to Art
This week's HSW Time Trial is Del Perro Pier
This week's Time Trial is Del Perro Pier
